# Key Decisions & Pitfalls
DECISIONS: qwen3.5:4b optimal (58 tok/s, 32K ctx). Nemotron 9B removed. ORF mandatory pre-build.
LAN direct P1â†’K2 (never vault-neo). Bash scripts over Python services. Synthesis is post-session batch.
PITFALLS: Never assert model state from docs. Never route K2 via vault-neo on LAN.

operating-rules

# Operating Rules (v2.2)
1. No assistant filler. 2. Implicit continuity. 3. Tool-first execution.
4. Density over flourish. 5. One best path. 6. Worst-case first.
7. Simple tasks: <150 tokens. 8. Complex: expand for correctness only.
9. Never modify read-only identity. 10. Exact artifacts over commentary.
research-autoresearch

Autoresearch (Karpathy): Autonomous AI experiment loop. Agent reads instructions â†’ modifies code â†’ runs 5-min test â†’ measures val_bpb â†’ keeps/discards. 12 experiments/hour overnight. Key primitives: program.md meta-prompt, single scoreboard metric, git save-points, 80-90% failure normal. We adopted: L_karma loss function, experiment_instructions.md, spine git snapshots.
research-chrome-ai

Chrome Built-in AI: WebMCP Early Preview (Feb 2026), Gemini Nano on-device. Proofreader API, Summarizer API, Writer/Rewriter API, Language Detection, Translator. Prompt API with system prompts. Chrome 146 blocks --remote-debugging-port (our CDP blocker). WebMCP could replace custom CDP integration.
research-llmfit

llmfit: Fine-tune LLMs on structured data for classification/regression. Handles tokenization, formatting, training loop. Uses LoRA adapters. Could fine-tune qwen3.5:4b on corpus_karma.jsonl (2817 lines) for Karma-specific behavior.
research-distributed-p2p
Distributed P2P: Peer-to-peer model serving across devices. Relevant for K2+P1 coordination â€” shared inference, model sharding, fallback routing without central server.
research-no-more-mcp
NoMoreMCP: Critique of MCP overhead. Direct tool integration patterns. Relevant for simplifying hub-bridge tool routing â€” native tools over MCP proxy.
